summary: Produced the M7 historical, cultural, and language review baseline before formal content fill. The baseline records source policy, claim records, uncertainty labels, language/name/title gates, cultural-risk gates, victim and long-term consequence requirements for coercive material, Human Gate routes for major unresolved cultural risk, M6 PASS_WITH_LIMITS carry-forward, and exact DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE preservation. It does not create formal content lock acceptance or accept any Beta real-world claim as locked content.

tests_run.result: Allowed task changes present plus unrelated forbidden untracked docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md left untouched: M project/tasks/active/M7-HISTORICAL-CULTURAL-LANGUAGE-REVIEW-001.json; M tests/content-schema-graph-source.test.ts; ?? content-source/m7-review-baseline/; ?? docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md.
M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 is the only ready output while this task is in REVIEW.

tests_run.result: shape ok: task REVIEW, M7 baseline present, no formal content lock acceptance, no accepted Beta real-world claims, DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE and PASS_WITH_LIMITS preserved.

Existing content packs validated: m1 abstract graph hash 4a438525; m2 prototype world hash 9ab72b0b; m3 character office hash 76b75849; m6 map candidate hash 4485a353; m6 alpha scenario hash 6d1f6d64.
Final rerun passed: 1 test file, 16 tests. Earlier development runs failed before local isRecord/isStringArray helpers were added, then were fixed.

decisions: Created a review baseline as content-source/process evidence, not as final historical content lock acceptance.
Recorded zero accepted Beta real-world claims in this baseline; later M7 fill must attach source records and labels before content use.
Used project docs as project baseline/policy evidence and recorded external academic works only as candidate sources where page-level verification is still RESEARCH REQUIRED.
Required source statements, scholarly interpretation, researcher inference, confidence, dispute status, competing interpretations, and game abstraction in baseline claim records.
Routed major unresolved cultural risk, coercive-content reward risk, sacred/religious imagery risk, and fixed identity shortcut risk to Human Gate rather than accepting them.
Preserved M6_GATE = PASS_WITH_LIMITS and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE exactly.
risks: Academic source entries in this baseline are candidate source records only; I did not claim full-text page verification for those sources.
Formal names, titles, transliterations, symbols, art, audio, clothing, architecture, and religious imagery remain RESEARCH REQUIRED until later specialist review.
M7 formal content lock acceptance remains a future Human Gate; this handoff must not be treated as content lock approval.
requested_action: Review the M7 historical/cultural/language baseline for source discipline, claim-record coverage, uncertainty labels, cultural-risk Human Gate routing, violence-cost handling, language/name/title gates, no modern-nationalist shortcuts, no unsupported certainty, no formal content lock acceptance, M6 PASS_WITH_LIMITS carry-forward, and exact DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE preservation.
